hero.headline: Run your entire school from one platform
hero.subheadline: ShikkhaERP is a cloud-based school management system built for Bangladeshi institutions — covering admissions, attendance, fees, exams, payroll, parent communication, and reporting, all in one place.
hero.trust: Free 14-day trial • No credit card required • Bengali support
